requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — IEC 62133 / BOS-adopted standard
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——IEC 62133/BOS采纳标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——IEC 62133/BOS採納標準

summary.en: Botswana does not publish bespoke lithium-cell test methods; the Botswana Bureau of Standards （BOBS） typically adopts international （IEC） and regional （SANS / South African） standards as Botswana Standards （BOS）. For portable lithium cells and battery packs the relevant safety reference is IEC 62133-2 （abuse testing: overcharge, short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge）. Where a battery or a battery-powered product falls within a BOBS compulsory standards specification, conformity to the adopted IEC/SANS safety standard and a valid test report from an accredited laboratory are expected as part of the BOS import-mark / conformity-assessment pathway. Acceptance of foreign accredited-lab reports is generally subject to BOBS recognition or an IECEE CB scheme certificate.
summary.zh: 博茨瓦纳不另行发布锂电芯测试方法；博茨瓦纳标准局（BOBS）通常将国际（IEC）和区域（SANS/南非）标准采纳为博茨瓦纳标准（BOS）。便携式锂电芯及电池组的相关安全参照为IEC 62133-2（滥用测试：过充、短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）。当电池或电池供电产品属于BOBS强制标准规范范围时，符合所采纳IEC/SANS安全标准并由认可实验室出具有效检测报告，是BOS进口标志/合格评定路径的预期要求。对境外认可实验室报告的接受，一般取决于BOBS的认可或IECEE CB体系证书。
summary.zht: 波札那不另行發布鋰電芯測試方法；波札那標準局（BOBS）通常將國際（IEC）和區域（SANS/南非）標準採納為波札那標準（BOS）。便攜式鋰電芯及電池組的相關安全參照為IEC 62133-2（濫用測試：過充、短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）。當電池或電池供電產品屬於BOBS強制標準規範範圍時，符合所採納IEC/SANS安全標準並由認可實驗室出具有效檢測報告，是BOS進口標誌/合格評定路徑的預期要求。對境外認可實驗室報告的接受，一般取決於BOBS的認可或IECEE CB體系證書。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62133-2 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications — Part 2: Lithium systems
BOS-adopted IEC/SANS safety standard (as referenced by the applicable BOBS compulsory specification)
IECEE CB Scheme certificate (commonly used to support recognition of foreign test reports)

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241-2022 （portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment）, with GB 18287 for mobile-phone batteries. GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. A GB 31241 report from a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory demonstrates Chinese domestic conformity but is not automatically recognised by BOBS; an IECEE CB certificate to IEC 62133-2 is generally the more portable basis for recognition in Botswana.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池），手机电池另有GB 18287。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室出具的GB 31241报告证明中国国内符合性，但不会自动被BOBS认可；依据IEC 62133-2的IECEE CB证书通常是在博茨瓦纳获得认可的更通用基础。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池），手機電池另有GB 18287。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室出具的GB 31241報告證明中國國內符合性，但不會自動被BOBS認可；依據IEC 62133-2的IECEE CB證書通常是在波札那獲得認可的更通用基礎。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Botswana works to international/IEC-aligned safety expectations rather than to China's GB 31241. Key gaps: (1) an existing GB 31241 report may not be accepted directly by BOBS; an IECEE CB report/certificate to IEC 62133-2 is the more portable evidence; (2) test-severity and acceptance differences between GB 31241 and IEC 62133-2 mean re-testing or a CB certificate may be required; (3) the controlling requirement is whether the product falls within a BOBS compulsory specification — exporters must confirm scope with BOBS rather than assume the EU 62133-2 harmonised route applies.
gap.zh: 博茨瓦纳采用与国际/IEC一致的安全要求，而非中国GB 31241。主要差距：（1）现有GB 31241报告可能不被BOBS直接接受，依据IEC 62133-2的IECEE CB报告/证书是更通用的证据；（2）GB 31241与IEC 62133-2在测试严苛程度和验收方面的差异，可能需要重新测试或取得CB证书；（3）关键在于产品是否属于BOBS强制规范范围——出口商须向BOBS确认范围，而非假设适用欧盟62133-2协调路径。
gap.zht: 波札那採用與國際/IEC一致的安全要求，而非中國GB 31241。主要差距：（1）現有GB 31241報告可能不被BOBS直接接受，依據IEC 62133-2的IECEE CB報告/證書是更通用的證據；（2）GB 31241與IEC 62133-2在測試嚴苛程度和驗收方面的差異，可能需要重新測試或取得CB證書；（3）關鍵在於產品是否屬於BOBS強制規範範圍——出口商須向BOBS確認範圍，而非假設適用歐盟62133-2協調路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Conditionally mandatory — where the product falls within a BOBS compulsory standards specification, conformity to the BOS-adopted IEC/SANS safety standard (IEC 62133-2 basis) is expected for the BOS import mark; foreign report acceptance subject to BOBS recognition / IECEE CB
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Botswana relies on internationally aligned safety standards (IEC 62133-2 basis) adopted as BOS, applied through BOBS conformity assessment where the product is in scope. A Chinese GB 31241 report is not automatically recognised; an IECEE CB certificate to IEC 62133-2 is generally the more portable evidence. Exporters should confirm with BOBS whether their specific product is covered and which test report it will accept.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 博茨瓦纳依赖采纳为BOS的国际一致安全标准（以IEC 62133-2为基础），在产品属管制范围时通过BOBS合格评定实施。中国GB 31241报告不会自动被认可；依据IEC 62133-2的IECEE CB证书通常是更通用的证据。出口商应向BOBS确认其具体产品是否被覆盖，以及将接受何种检测报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 波札那依賴採納為BOS的國際一致安全標準（以IEC 62133-2為基礎），在產品屬管制範圍時透過BOBS合格評定實施。中國GB 31241報告不會自動被認可；依據IEC 62133-2的IECEE CB證書通常是更通用的證據。出口商應向BOBS確認其具體產品是否被覆蓋，以及將接受何種檢測報告。
